items.example: If I were you, I'd ask a lot of questions first.

items.translation: Что бы ты сделал(а), если бы …?
items.example: What would you do if you lost your keys?

items.phrase: If I had more time, I'd …
items.translation: Если бы у меня было больше времени, я бы …
items.example: If I had more time, I'd learn to play the guitar.
I wouldn't worry if I were you.
Would you tell the police if you saw a crime?

items.translation: Если бы я мог …, я бы …
items.example: If I could speak perfect English, I'd move to London.
What if you won the lottery?

items.phrase: I'd … if I got the chance
items.translation: Я бы …, если бы представилась возможность
items.example: I'd travel the world if I got the chance.
